query_normalized: exploring the convergence of iterated function systems with non-contractive maps mathematics
rationale: This paper qualifies under (d) Foundational methodology / canonical reference and (b) Independent-or-dependent variable on the same domain. It studies the same mathematical domain (Iterated Function Systems) and discusses Falconer's theorem, which is the canonical baseline for IFS dimension and convergence theory that any literature review on IFS convergence would need to cite to establish the contractive case before contrasting with non-contractive maps.
